criteria.name: feedback timing has no leakage violations
v1.6 no-replay context feature is active
v1.6 no-replay memory receives context updates
upper-bound condition is solvable
criteria.note: If unbounded keyed memory cannot solve the stressor, replay is not the next justified repair.

tier_summary.claim_boundary: Software need-test diagnostic only: tests whether v1.6 no-replay keyed memory degrades under replay/consolidation pressure before implementing replay. Not a replay mechanism, hardware evidence, or native on-chip memory.

summary.claim_boundary: Software need-test diagnostic only: tests whether v1.6 no-replay keyed memory degrades under replay/consolidation pressure before implementing replay. Not a replay mechanism, hardware evidence, or native on-chip memory.
